sections.paragraph:
adj. (pr. from the subst. חֹפֶשׁ = חֻפְשָׁה with the adj. termination ־ִי) pl. חָפְשִׁים-

(1) prostrate, infirm, Psa 88:6. [See חֹפֶשׁ .]

(2) free, as opposed to a slave or captive, Job 3:19. שִׁלַּה חָפְשִׁי to set a slave free, to make him a freed man, Deu 15:12, 13 Deu 15:13, 18 Deu 15:18שִׁלַּח לַחָפְשִׁי id. Exo 21:26, 27 Exo 21:27, לַחָפְשִׁי, יָצָא חָפְשִׁי to be set free (see יָצָא ).

(3) free, enjoying immunity from public burdens, 1Sa 17:25.
